evidence_summary: In May 2022, Axsome Therapeutics completed the acquisition of the drug Sunosi (solriamfetol) from Jazz Pharmaceuticals. This was an asset purchase (divestiture) rather than a corporate acquisition or merger of the companies themselves. Both Axsome Therapeutics and Jazz Pharmaceuticals remain independent, publicly traded entities. Under the terms of the deal, Axsome paid $53 million upfront and agreed to pay royalties to Jazz on future sales of the drug.
